sys_script_fix.description:
DFCT0012421 - 2024-05-31 - RAJ - After running fix script- 2.8.401 - Default Privacy fields to open – it does not change the privacy of the template DFCT0012327 - 2023-01-18 - RAJ - User not able to set primary assignee on subtask due to empty "privacy level" after upgrade on older task when upgraded STRY0148573 - Create a fix script for OU Privacy for existing Task Trees, Tasks, Templates, and Template Tasks NOTE: update in 2.8.4 Patch | 2024-04-04 | STRY0148573 - Create a fix script for OU Privacy for existing Task Trees, Tasks, Templates, Template Tasks and Template Instances NOTE: and update was required on this fix, had to change the query as notNullQuery did not work for the privacy field.
Release Introduced: 2.8.3 - Only needs to be run a single time - In 2.8, a privacy field was added to tasks and task trees. - Customers noticed that when this field is empty users have trouble changing the Primary Assignee - This script finds all empty privacy fields and sets them to open.
Purpose: - This script changes the privacy of the Task Trees, Tasks, Templates, Template Tasks, and Template Instances to match the privacy of the Primary Office's Top OU - Task Trees and Tasks created by running templates were not setting the privacy correctly. - Templates, Template Tasks, and Template Instances were not updated and defaulted to open - The template run code was corrected to properly set the privacy as tasks are created - This script corrects the bad data on Task Trees, Tasks, Templates, Template Tasks, and Template Instances created before this release
Validation: - Open the Task Tree Task table - /x_153465_discovert_task_tree_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASprimary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy" - Open the Tasker Task table - /x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASprimary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy"
- Open the Template table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_template_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASu_primary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy" - Open the Template Task table - /x_153465_discovert_route_tasks_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASprimary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy" - Open the Template Instance table - /x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_runtime_list.do - set the filter to "u_privacyNSAMEASu_primary_office.u_top_ou.u_organizational_privacy"
- This will show all of the records that will be changed
- Run the script - Refresh the page, all mismatches should be gone from the list
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.401 - Default Privacy fields to open
